sn7.6:1.1: At Sāvatthī. Then the brahmin Jaṭa Bharadvaja, Bharadvaja of the Tangle, approached the Blessed One and exchanged greetings with him. When they had concluded their greetings and cordial talk, he sat down to one side and addressed the Blessed One in verse:
sn7.6:6.1: When this was said, the brahmin Jaṭa Bharadvaja said to the Blessed One: "Magnificent, Master Gotama! … " And the Venerable Bharadvaja became one of the arahants.
